app.title: Mystic Cards — Online Tarot & Card Reading
app.subtitle: Unveil Your Destiny
app.description: Choose your deck, shuffle the cards, and discover what the universe has in store for you.

nav.articlesDesc: Discover expert guides, card meanings, and divination techniques.

reading.question: Ask a Question
reading.questionPrompt: What would you like to ask the cards?
reading.questionPlaceholder: e.g., Will I get the new job?
reading.exLove: Will I find true love soon?
reading.exCareer: What is the next step in my career?
reading.exFinance: Will my financial situation improve this year?
reading.exDaily: What do I need to focus on today?
reading.exHealth: How can I improve my overall well-being?

deck.tarotDesc: The classic 78-card Tarot deck with Major and Minor Arcana
deck.oracleDesc: A 44-card Oracle deck for spiritual guidance
deck.playingDesc: A standard 52-card playing deck for cartomancy

cards.selectCard: Select a card to reveal your reading
cards.useSlider: Use the slider to browse, then tap to select

result.title: Your Reading Result
result.aiWallpaperDesc: Transform your reading into a beautiful, mystical phone wallpaper — crafted just for you.
result.summaryMessage: Your reading is complete. Here is the overview of the energies revealed to you today.

freemium.freeReadingUsed: You've used your free reading for today.
freemium.watchAd: Watch an Ad for Another Reading
freemium.readingsRemaining: You have {count} free readings left today
freemium.watchAdDesc: Watch a short ad to unlock one more free reading — the stars await!
freemium.adCompleteDesc: The universe has rewarded your patience. Your free reading is ready!

footer.disclaimer: Mystic Cards is for entertainment purposes only. The readings provided do not substitute for professional medical, legal, or financial advice.

seo.title: About Mystic Cards
seo.description: Welcome to Mystic Cards, your digital sanctuary for Tarot, Oracle, and Lenormand readings. Whether you are seeking daily guidance, deep introspective answers through the Celtic Cross, or just a fun way to explore the mystical arts, our interactive card spreads are designed to spark your intuition. Choose your deck, focus on your question, and let the universe reveal its wisdom.

auth.profileSubtitle: Please complete your destiny profile to get accurate readings.
auth.emailAlreadyInUse: This email is already registered. If you signed up with Google, please click 'Continue with Google'.
auth.invalidCredential: Invalid email or password. If you signed up with Google, please click 'Continue with Google'.
